name: nemesis-v2-omni-brain
description: Nemesis v2 — Rubick knowledge graph + Nemesis orchestrator. Full engineering intelligence suite: Ideation → Solutioning → Tech Spec pipeline, Brain memory, @Slash, Franco data collection, E2E testing, diagrams, docs, standup, tickets, and deploy validation.
author: saurav.k@razorpay.com

commands.name: nemesis
commands.description: Nemesis orchestrator — intelligent routing to Ideation (overview), Solutioning (solution + risk), Tech Spec (docs), and Rubick (knowledge). Natural language interface for all Razorpay engineering tasks. Use for: any architecture, design, feature analysis, knowledge query, code understanding, or system design question.

commands.name: brain
commands.description: Omni Brain memory agent — graph ops, ingestion, context retrieval, features, planning. Manages rubick.db knowledge graph with 715K nodes across 45 Razorpay services.

commands.name: franco
commands.description: Universal data collector — pulls data from any source (Slack, Gmail, Drive, GitHub, DevRev, Figma, Calendar, local files, Rubick graph, repo skills) and saves to rubick.db via the learning pipeline. Auto-detects source type from URLs/IDs. Normalizes to FrancoDocument schema. Deduplicates on (source_type, source_id). Other skills invoke Franco for data collection instead of making raw MCP calls.

commands.name: slash
commands.description: Query Razorpay's @slash knowledge bot via Slack — ask questions, deep dives, recall cached responses, scan channels. Uses channel C0B3U3Z2JG1. Queue-aware polling for deep responses.

commands.name: silencer
commands.description: Phase 3 document generation agent. Creates Google Docs matching the exact Razorpay Tech Spec template (16 sections). Generates professional diagrams via Canva MCP. Reads from Ideation overview and Solutioning output.

commands.name: doc
commands.description: Create .docx tech specs and design docs locally using the Razorpay 16-section template — from nemesis output, brain context, or manual content. Uses python-docx, no Drive upload needed.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Payment flow explainer using step0-5 docs as knowledge base — answers questions, explains flows, generates docx, learns to Brain. Covers mandate lifecycle, offer evaluation, settlement, recurring payments.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Code review, API audit, manager review, bug triage, deploy checklist — orchestrates engineering + razorpay + atlassian skills. Applies 8 Razorpay domain checks (idempotency, reconciliation, amount precision, PCI, etc.).

commands.name: diagram
commands.description: Generate architecture diagrams from Brain graph data — flow, arch, entity, impact, timeline, whiteboard, class. Uses Canva MCP (primary for polished output), Mermaid (structural), Excalidraw (whiteboard).

commands.name: designer
commands.description: Visual design agent — creates, references, and exports visual artifacts using Canva (professional), Mermaid (structural), Figma (reference), Excalidraw (whiteboard), and Blade (Razorpay design system). Supports iterative editing, Figma imports, mockup generation.

commands.name: standup
commands.description: Daily standup, weekly reports, meeting prep, channel digests, announcements — aggregates Slack, GitHub, Calendar, Brain. Spawns standup-agent for parallel data collection.

commands.name: tickets
commands.description: Jira/DevRev ticket management — create from specs, triage bugs, track milestones, search Confluence, sync Brain ↔ tickets. Primary consumer of all 5 Atlassian skills.

commands.name: db-validator
commands.description: Pre-deploy and payment state validator for Razorpay. Validates payment records, Splitz flags, DCS configs, and deployment status before feature releases. Three-layer: Watchtower, @Slash + Coralogix, Redash REST API.

commands.name: scenario
commands.description: Test scenario generator — creates comprehensive test scenarios from feature context. Reads overview + solution artifacts, expert knowledge, and cross-project edges to produce happy path, edge case, integration, and regression scenarios.

commands.name: pipeline
commands.description: Pipeline orchestration controller — view and control the Nemesis feature pipeline. Shows phase completion status, lists features, runs specific phases, resets artifacts, and compares feature outputs.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Interactive daily planner, task manager, and personal assistant powered by Rubick. Daily planning, task tracking, feature context, missed communications, weekly reviews, focus sessions.

commands.name: e2e
commands.description: E2E testing orchestrator for the Nemesis v2 feature pipeline (Phase 4). Automated test generation, execution via e2e-test-orchestrator or ROAST, and coverage review. Enriches Rubick with TestResult nodes.

skills.name: omni-brain
skills.description: Central memory agent — Rubick knowledge graph (715K nodes, 45 projects), 4-phase Nemesis pipeline, 46 project experts, Franco data collection, @Slash integration

agents.name: nemesis-agent
agents.description: Heavy analysis worker and skill orchestration delegate for Nemesis orchestrator. Runs Phase 1-3 pipeline steps, code tracing, @Slash queries, and risk analysis.

agents.name: project-expert-agent
agents.description: Per-project expert sub-agent that deeply reads a codebase and stores structured expertise in Rubick. Parameterized by project slug. Levels up (L1→L5) with each feature analysis.

agents.name: brain-ingest-agent
agents.description: Parallel ingestion worker for multi-source fetches — processes GitHub, Slack, Gmail, Drive, DevRev sources concurrently into rubick.db.

agents.name: silencer-agent
agents.description: Sub-agent for parallel section generation in Tech Spec doc creator. Each agent generates 3-5 sections of the Razorpay Tech Spec, delegating to engineering skills first.

agents.name: e2e-expert-agent
agents.description: E2E testing specialist for Nemesis v2 Phase 4. Generates test code matching existing patterns, executes via orchestrator, and reviews coverage gaps introduced by feature changes.

agents.name: learn-agent
agents.description: Batch knowledge flush sub-agent for processing 5+ learning items without blocking the main session. Writes nodes/edges to rubick.db via learning pipeline.

agents.name: review-agent
agents.description: Parallel code review + API audit sub-agent — runs engineering skills concurrently for PR analysis with 8 Razorpay domain checks.

agents.name: standup-agent
agents.description: Parallel standup data collection sub-agent — gathers Slack, Calendar, GitHub, Brain data concurrently for daily standups and weekly reports.
